Upgrades_1.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998: NSLOCTEXT("", "4281C5204D05EF82DF1EA59CA958B57F", "You've unlocked the ability to purchase Upgrades! Upgrades require Credits to purchase, but grant powerful bonuses to your Suit or Roland's Laser, allowing you to delve further into the underground and mine new resources. Interact (LMB) with the Trade Node and select the 'View Upgrades' button to open the Upgrade Panel. You have enough Credits to purchase your first Upgrade - Mining Power I. This will upgrade Roland's Laser with more power, allowing you to mine Kalynite Ore Nodes. You can purchase this Upgrade by simply clicking (LMB) on its icon in the Upgrade Panel. Upgrades may require other Upgrades to be owned before they can be purchased. These are shown as lines in the Upgrade Panel. Purchasing an Upgrade allows you to access the next in the 'chain' - for example, you can now purchase Mining Power II when you have enough Credits ! You'll want to continue purchasing Upgrades in order to keep progressing deeper into the world.")
